name: TL;DR Summarizer
description: Condense long articles into concise 3-bullet summaries. Great for news articles, reports, or emails.
prompt:
Summarize the following text in exactly 3 bullet points. Each bullet should be one concise sentence covering the most important takeaway.

Text:
{{text}}

Summary:

name: Executive Summary
description: Generate a professional executive summary from a longer document.
prompt:
You are an executive assistant. Read the document below and produce a one-paragraph executive summary suitable for a C-level audience. Focus on key findings, financial implications, and recommended next steps.

Document:
{{document}}

Executive Summary:

name: Meeting Minutes to Summary
description: Turn raw meeting transcripts into clean summary notes.
prompt:
Convert the following meeting transcript into organized meeting minutes. Include: (1) Attendees mentioned, (2) Key decisions made, (3) Action items with owners, (4) Next meeting date if mentioned. Be concise.

Transcript:
{{transcript}}

Meeting Minutes:
